headline: GM, LG joint venture recalls 700 workers to make non-EV batteries
summary: GM said the plans allow the venture to adjust operations and bring people back to work sooner than originally planned.

headline: What's Behind Ford's Approval of a New Share Repurchase Plan?

headline: IONNA Celebrates Second Anniversary with Bold Moves and Promises Filled
summary: IONNA, the EV Charging joint venture born of eight leading automakers, marks a milestone achievement this quarter as we celebrate our second anniversary. In just 24 months, IONNA has built a charging network fit for a road trip, live, growing, and serving drivers nationwide.
